tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: My friends are leaving for Echo in 30 minutes, but my midterm is tomorrow and I still have review work left to do.
I've informed Mina I'm skipping tonight to prioritize my exam prep, aligning with my need to finish review work before the midterm.
I made progress on my midterm review, raising my preparation from 0.60 to 0.78, but I missed the opportunity to go out with friends since that window has closed.
After sleeping eight hours, my energy is fully restored to 10.0 with no sleep debt, putting me in an optimal state to finish the remaining midterm review.
My midterm review is now complete, having reached full preparation by 08:15. With my energy restored and the task done, I am ready for the exam.
I have accepted Mina's invitation, confirming my social plan after successfully completing my midterm review.
I have joined the social club and received a warm welcome, but my midterm exam has now begun while I am still at this gathering.

agent.last_reasoning: The midterm deadline has passed (Fri 09:00), so exam prep is no longer active. With the club event resolved and high energy, sleeping immediately recovers state without delaying any pending tasks like laundry.
